ROSETTASCRIPTS.TASKOPERATIONS:
Does not Design, but repacks residues Restrict to residues within a distance and vector cutoff of the protein-protein interface chain1_num="1,2" chain2_num="3,4"
Fix residues known experimentally to be critical in interaction
ROSETTASCRIPTS.MOVERS:
MINIMIZATION MOVERS Single cycle of FastRelax to minimize backbone of docking partners at interface
DOCKING MOVERS
Speeds the move from centroid to full atom mode jump number 0 will not move the proteins away from each other... possibly use "@flag_ensemble_docking" and @flag_ensemble_prepack
ROSETTASCRIPTS.PROTOCOLS:
Run docking protocol w/o prepacking Add mover="ppk"/>
Minimize interface
